title: PK
tmdbOverview: A stranger in the city asks questions no one has asked before. Known only by his initials, the man's innocent questions and childlike curiosity take him on a journey of love, laughter and letting go.
synopsis: PK (2014) is a comedy, drama and science fiction film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
